title: eulophia nervosa
intro: Eulophia nervosa, also known as the Nerve Orchid or African Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits associated with Eulophia nervosa include relief from fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Eulophia nervosa can be made by infusing the roots or leaves in water, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
